speaker: Celio
text: Now, for today’s lecture…

speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, Celio! Hope you don’t mind bargin' in! *sigh*

speaker: Derich
text: During one of Professor Celio’s lectures, Professor Derich suddenly opens the door and walks in. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: “Professor Derich? What is it?”

speaker: Diederich
text: My exam is finally ready to go. I just had to hurry over and let you know.

speaker: Celio
text: So hasty... You got the proper clearance, right?

speaker: Diederich
text: Yep! It’s all taken care of!

speaker: Celio
text: Then I have no objections, do as you wish. *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: Right! Then I guess this is a good time to make my big announcement!

speaker: Diederich
text: Listen up! This year’s practical exam is gonna be off-campus. You're all gonna take a ride on a Ludvigo ship! *sigh*

speaker: Oscar
text: A ship?

speaker: Grantly
text: A ship!?

speaker: Argo
text: A ship!!

speaker: Diederich
text: That’s right! I talked it over with Ludvigo’s dragon Baten and got him to lend me one of his boats. Won't that make for a nice change of scenery? *sigh*

speaker: Grantly
text: Y-You made a deal with a dragon...?

speaker: Argo
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*

speaker: Unknown
text: Oh yeahh, I talked with Professor Derich about that not too long ago.
He said he could go out to sea if he got us on a boat as part of his training.
But I didn’t know it would be provided by a dragon of all people. Not only that, but it's for an exam…

speaker: Theo
text: Wait a moment. Then what was all the training we’ve had so far for? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Hm? *paw*

speaker: Theo
text: It was for fencing and martial arts! Those have nothing to do with sailing! *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: Ah, don’t get your panties in a bunch. Your usual trainin' will be part of your score. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: You’ll have an “adaptability test” on the ship. It won’t be anything like writin’ or fencin’!

speaker: Celio
text: The idea of being aboard a ship was Professor Derich’s. I would not allow it on its own either.

speaker: Celio
text: But you know a knight's work involves a lot of international travel. With that in mind, training on a ship makes perfect sense.

speaker: Celio
text: There are many dangers, such as pirate attacks. It is better for you to get accustomed to it now rather than later. *sigh*

speaker: Theo
text: But I’ve never been on a boat before. I doubt the others have as well.
...I'm sure that’s true for those from Harshreich. I’ve been told it’s a mountainous country.

speaker: Unknown
text: "And Frontail shares a border with it, so they’ve never had a chance to ride a ship, have they?"

speaker: Diederich
text: You’re a knight. Gettin' thrown into situations you have no experience with is gonna happen all the time. *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: You’re just gonna have to roll with it. It’s a test of your responsiveness, after all. *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: You won't be graded on sailin' itself. Argo’d have too much of an advantage if I did. *

speaker: Argo
text: He’s right. *sigh*
Since I already know how to operate a boat, he had to make sure there was another grading standard.

speaker: Celio
text: I told him not to be too hard on you, so you’ll probably be fine. Just think of it as another part of your training. *sigh*

speaker: Theo
text: ...I suppose that’s fine. I’m actually a little curious about this whole sailing thing. *eager tail wag*

speaker: Argo
text: (Oh? Never thought he’d say that…)

speaker: Diederich
text: No other questions!? All right then, we’ll be shovin’ off from the harbor in three days! Make sure you’re ready! *sigh*
...Then, the day of the exam quickly arrives.

speaker: Diederich
text: All right! Everyone gather 'round!
Professor Derich takes a roll call. The Frontail and Harshreich students are all present and accounted for. *sigh*

speaker: Paul
text: With his "condition" not letting him leave the college, Paul is the only one who's absent.

speaker: Celio
text: Please be careful, everyone. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, you’re not going?

speaker: Celio
text: I must stay here and watch the college. I shall wait here for your return. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Okay. See you later!

speaker: Diedereich
text: Right then, get on board everyone! It’s time to shove off! *sigh*
Professor Derich is in a particularly good mood as he leads us onboard.
With the anchor weighed, the mooring rope untied, and a ring of the departure bell, we slowly pull away from the dock.

speaker: Professor Celio
text: "Professor Celio waves his hand at us as his form gradually gets smaller and smaller." *sigh*

speaker: Elara
text: It’s been a long time since I last felt this: the excitement of leaving behind me and going out to sea. *sigh*
A ship! The sea! I've finally returned!

speaker: Diederich
text: Your first day's onboard test is "nothing"!!
Professor Derich makes that announcement for all the sailing virgins.

speaker: Grantly
text: What do you mean, "nothing"? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Exactly what it sounds like! Just being onboard is the test!

speaker: Oscar
text: That’s it? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, you’ll understand as the trip goes on.

speaker: Theo
text: "Don’t you dare look at me like that." *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: For now, just enjoy the ride!

speaker: Diederich
text: “We’ll get back together at dinnertime. You’re on your own until then! That’s all!”
